title: Create: Garnished Additions
description: Garnished Additions is an addon mod to Create: Garnished that adds over 100 new edible foods and a host of other items and recipes to the game!
body:
⠀

Create: Garnished Additions is an addon mod to Create: Garnished that adds over 100 new edible foods and a host of other items and recipes to the game, along with a new armour and tool set above Netherite, as well as making several important minecraft items renewable!

This mod is designed to be used alongside my previous project, Garnished Botany Pots, which adds full support between [Create: Garnished](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-garnished)'s Plants & Nuts, and Botany Pots (from the mod [Botany Pots](https://modrinth.com/mod/botany-pots/)).

### As of Version 0.8.0, Create: Garnished Additions adds: - 78 Unique Food Items - 10 Nut Mixes - 3x Complete Nut Variations (**Salted**, **Roasted**, and **Honey Roasted**) - 41 New Non-Food Items - A New Ingot, Toolset, and Armour set - New Wood Type - 2 New Fluids - 3 New Plants - 8 New Advancements - 19 New Compatibility/Automation Recipes you can find much more detailed information on my [Github Wiki!](https://github.com/PanPanda1/Garnished-Additions/wiki/home)
